nasb.text: “They shall construct an ark of acacia wood two and a half cubits long, and one and a half cubits wide, and one and a half cubits high.

esv.text: “They shall make an ark of acacia wood. Two cubits and a half shall be its length, a cubit and a half its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.

cnv.text: “他們要用皂莢木做一個櫃，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分，高六十六公分。

ccb.text: “要用皂荚木做一个柜，长一点一米，宽六十六厘米，高六十六厘米，
